prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-702 Data/comm & security within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.7 Low Voltage & Specialty. The observed field condition is: plenum vs. riser cable in wrong space. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors TIA-568, NEC 800. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 E-702 Measurement & estimation
